AL.name: Alabama
AL.instructions:
1. File missing Business Privilege Tax returns with the Dept. of Revenue.
2. Submit a Reinstatement package to the Secretary of State.

AK.name: Alaska
AK.instructions:
1. Log into the Div. of Corporations portal.
2. File all missing Biennial Reports online.
3. Pay past-due fees.

AZ.name: Arizona
AZ.instructions:
1. Log into the Arizona Business Center at ACC.
2. File an Application for Reinstatement.
3. Submit missing Annual Reports (Corporations only).

AR.name: Arkansas
AR.instructions:
1. Log into the SOS portal.
2. File and pay all past-due Annual Franchise Taxes online.

CA.name: California
CA.instructions:
1. Identify if suspended by SOS (missing Statement of Info) or FTB (unpaid taxes).
2. Pay back taxes/penalties to FTB and get a Certificate of Revivor.
3. File missing Statements of Information with the SOS.

CO.name: Colorado
CO.instructions:
1. Search for your entity on the SOS site.
2. Click 'File a form,' then select 'Cure Delinquency.'
3. Pay the fee online.

CT.name: Connecticut
CT.instructions:
1. Log into business.ct.gov.
2. File a Reinstatement form and submit all missing Annual Reports online.

DE.name: Delaware
DE.instructions:
1. Calculate past-due franchise taxes or alternative entity taxes.
2. File a Certificate of Revival with the Div. of Corporations and pay all balances.

FL.name: Florida
FL.instructions:
1. Go to Sunbiz.org.
2. Submit a Reinstatement application online.
3. Pay all past-due Annual Report fees.

GA.name: Georgia
GA.instructions:
1. Log into the eCorp portal.
2. Submit an Application for Reinstatement.
3. Pay all back Annual Registration fees.

HI.name: Hawaii
HI.instructions:
1. Log into the DCCA portal.
2. File missing Annual Reports.
3. Submit a Reinstatement application.

ID.name: Idaho
ID.instructions:
1. Log into SOSbiz.
2. File all missing Annual Reports online to automatically restore standing.

IL.name: Illinois
IL.instructions:
1. Pay all franchise taxes/penalties to the Dept. of Revenue to get a Letter of Tax Clearance.
2. Submit the Clearance and an Application for Reinstatement to the SOS.

IN.name: Indiana
IN.instructions:
1. Log into INBiz.
2. File an Application for Reinstatement and submit missing Biennial Reports online.

IA.name: Iowa
IA.instructions:
1. Log into Fast Track Filing.
2. File missing Biennial Reports.
3. Submit an Application for Reinstatement.

KS.name: Kansas
KS.instructions:
1. File all missing Information Reports online.
2. Submit a Reinstatement form to the SOS.

KY.name: Kentucky
KY.instructions:
1. Log into the FastTrack portal.
2. File a Reinstatement application and submit missing Annual Reports.

LA.name: Louisiana
LA.instructions:
1. Log into geauxBIZ.
2. File an Application for Reinstatement and submit missing Annual Reports.

ME.name: Maine
ME.instructions:
1. Complete an Application for Excuse/Reinstatement.
2. Mail it to the SOS with all past-due Annual Report fees.

MD.name: Maryland
MD.instructions:
1. File all missing Annual Reports/Personal Property Returns with SDAT.
2. File Articles of Revival.

MA.name: Massachusetts
MA.instructions:
1. Log into the SOC portal.
2. File all missing Annual Reports online and pay associated fees.

MI.name: Michigan
MI.instructions:
1. Log into the LARA portal.
2. File a Certificate of Restoration of Good Standing.
3. Submit all missing Annual Statements.

MN.name: Minnesota
MN.instructions:
1. Log into the SOS portal.
2. File a current-year Annual Renewal online to restore active status.

MS.name: Mississippi
MS.instructions:
1. Log into the SOS portal.
2. File a Reinstatement form.
3. Submit missing Annual Reports.

MO.name: Missouri
MO.instructions:
1. File all missing Annual Registration Reports online.
2. Submit an Application for Rescission of Dissolution.

MT.name: Montana
MT.instructions:
1. Log into the ePass portal.
2. File an Application for Reinstatement.
3. Submit missing Annual Reports.

NE.name: Nebraska
NE.instructions:
1. Complete an Application for Reinstatement.
2. Mail it to the SOS along with missing Biennial Report fees.

NV.name: Nevada
NV.instructions:
1. Log into SilverFlume.
2. File missing Annual Lists.
3. Pay State Business License fees plus late penalties online.

NH.name: New Hampshire
NH.instructions:
1. Log into QuickStart.
2. File a Reinstatement form and submit missing Annual Reports.

NJ.name: New Jersey
NJ.instructions:
1. Obtain a Tax Clearance Certificate from the Div. of Taxation.
2. File for Reinstatement with the Div. of Revenue.

NM.name: New Mexico
NM.instructions:
1. Log into the SOS portal.
2. File an Application for Reinstatement and pay missing report fees.

NY.name: New York
NY.instructions:
1. Pay outstanding franchise taxes to the Dept. of Taxation to get 'Consent to Reinstatement.'
2. File missing Biennial Statements with the Dept. of State.

NC.name: North Carolina
NC.instructions:
1. Submit an Application for Reinstatement.
2. File all missing Annual Reports.

ND.name: North Dakota
ND.instructions:
1. Log into FirstStop.
2. File a Reinstatement application and missing Annual Reports online.

OH.name: Ohio
OH.instructions:
1. Obtain Tax Clearance from the Dept. of Taxation.
2. File a Reinstatement (Form 525) with the SOS.

OK.name: Oklahoma
OK.instructions:
1. Get tax clearance from the Tax Commission (Corps only).
2. File missing Annual Certificates (LLCs) or a Reinstatement form.

OR.name: Oregon
OR.instructions:
1. Log into the SOS portal.
2. File a Reinstatement form and missing Annual Reports online.

PA.name: Pennsylvania
PA.instructions:
1. Obtain Tax Clearance from the Dept. of Revenue.
2. File an Application for Reinstatement with the Dept. of State.

RI.name: Rhode Island
RI.instructions:
1. Obtain a Letter of Good Standing from the Div. of Taxation.
2. File a Reinstatement application with the SOS.

SC.name: South Carolina
SC.instructions:
1. Submit missing tax returns to the Dept. of Revenue to get tax clearance.
2. File an Application for Reinstatement with the SOS.

SD.name: South Dakota
SD.instructions:
1. Log into the SOS portal.
2. File a Reinstatement form and missing Annual Reports online.

TN.name: Tennessee
TN.instructions:
1. Log into the tnbear portal.
2. File a Reinstatement form and missing Annual Reports online.

TX.name: Texas
TX.instructions:
1. File past-due franchise tax reports with the Comptroller.
2. Request a Tax Clearance Letter (Form 05-391).
3. Submit the Clearance Letter and Reinstatement Form to the SOS.

UT.name: Utah
UT.instructions:
1. Log into the SOS portal.
2. File an Application for Reinstatement and missing Annual Renewals online.

VT.name: Vermont
VT.instructions:
1. Log into the SOS portal.
2. File a Reinstatement application and missing Annual Reports online.

VA.name: Virginia
VA.instructions:
1. Request a Reinstatement packet directly from the SCC.
2. Mail the completed packet along with missing Annual Report fees.

WA.name: Washington
WA.instructions:
1. Log into the CCFS portal.
2. File a Reinstatement application and missing Annual Reports online.

WV.name: West Virginia
WV.instructions:
1. Get Tax Clearance from the State Tax Dept., Workforce WV, and Unemployment.
2. File a Reinstatement with the SOS (One Stop).

WI.name: Wisconsin
WI.instructions:
1. Log into the DFI portal.
2. File a Reinstatement form and missing Annual Reports online.

WY.name: Wyoming
WY.instructions:
1. Print the Reinstatement form from the SOS website.
2. Mail it in with all missing Annual Report fees.

DC.name: Dist. of Columbia
DC.instructions:
1. Log into CorpOnline.
2. File for Reinstatement and submit missing biennial reports.
